innateAbility.name: Fundamental Forging
innateAbility.description: Grants an additional random enchantment that does not provide negative stats whenever crafting a neutral item.

abilities.name: Chaos Bolt
abilities.description: Throws a bolt at the unit-targeted enemy that stuns for a random duration and deals a random amount of damage.

abilities.name: Reality Rift
abilities.description: Teleports Chaos Knight and all illusions he has and the targeted unit to a point along the line between both of them.Applies armor reduction to the affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Chaos Strike
abilities.description: Chaos Knight and his illusions' attacks have a chance to deal a critical strike of varying strength, in addition to a lifesteal for the percentage of the damage.

abilities.name: Phantasm
abilities.description: Summons several phantasm copies of the Chaos Knight from alternate dimensions.
